info.english_meaning: to worship to show honor to do homage to show respect to venerate to bow to salute to praise to adore to greet
info.hindI_arTa: satkArapUrvaka kuSala praSna pUCanA namaskAra karanA stuti karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: praRatipUrvam ASizo vAcanam- aBivAdanam ' iti mADavIyaDAtuvfttiH  ' natimAtraM vA aBivAdanam ' iti DAtukAvya vyAKyAyAm (1.3)  ' nutyaBivAdayoH ' iti vopadevaH

upasarga_meanings.meaning: AdarapUrvaka praRAma karanA vinamratA se praRAma karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'aBUd dUtaH prahito jAtavedAH sAyaM nyahna upavandyo nfBiH' (aTarva0 18465)
